cards.description_raw: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
cards.upgrade_description: Deal 7 damage and apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.

cards.name: Tremble
cards.description: Apply 3 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
cards.description_raw: Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description: Apply 4 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

cards.name: True Grit
cards.description:
Gain 7 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card at random.
cards.description_raw:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card{IfUpgraded:show:| at random}.
cards.upgrade_description:
Gain 9 [gold]Block[/gold].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card.

cards.name: Twin Strike
cards.description: Deal 5 damage twice.
cards.description_raw: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice.
cards.upgrade_description: Deal 7 damage twice.

cards.name: Unmovable
cards.description: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each turn, double the amount gained.
cards.description_raw: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each turn, double the amount gained.

cards.name: Unrelenting
cards.description:
Deal 12 damage.
The next Attack you play costs 0 [energy:1].
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
The next Attack you play costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 18 damage.
The next Attack you play costs 0 [energy:1].

cards.name: Uppercut
cards.description:
Deal 13 damage.
Apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
Apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
cards.description_raw:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
cards.upgrade_description:
Deal 13 damage.
Apply 2 [gold]Weak[/gold].
Apply 2 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].

cards.name: Vicious
cards.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], draw 1 card.
cards.description_raw: Whenever you apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
cards.upgrade_description: Whenever you apply [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Whirlwind
cards.description: Deal 5 damage to ALL enemies X times.
cards.description_raw: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies X times.
cards.upgrade_description: Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies X times.
